pkgmetadata.longdescription: Augur is a tool for parsing and renaming TV episodes. Examples: @ The.4400.S04E02.DSR.XviD-ORENJi.avi -> The 4400 - 4x02 - Fear Itself.avi 24.S06E01.6AM.TO.7AM.PROPER.DVDRip.XviD-MEMETiC.avi -> 24 - 6x01 - Day 6: 6:00 AM - 7:00 AM.avi @ The pretty printing format is configurable with the default being @%S - %sx%2e - %E.%l@.
